# Polyculture Research

> Data science and analytics consulting for sustainability-focused companies. We help growing businesses measure what matters — both the KPIs that drive decisions and the environmental metrics that matter for the planet.

Polyculture Research is based in Petaluma, California and works with clients across the US. Founded by Devon Sampson Wills, PhD (Environmental Studies) with 10+ years of data science experience at fast-moving startups including VSCO.

We specialize in companies between $5M–$30M in annual revenue that are committed to sustainability — B Corps, environmental businesses, and mission-driven companies that need sophisticated analytics without a full in-house data team.

## Services

- [Services](https://polycultureresearch.com/services): Data infrastructure (Snowflake, BigQuery, dbt), core business analytics (ARR, MRR, churn, retention), predictive analytics (churn prediction, customer segmentation, LTV modeling), and sustainability metrics (carbon accounting, B Corp metrics, supply chain transparency).

## About

- [About](https://polycultureresearch.com/about): Team background, company history, and why we started Polyculture Research. Devon holds a PhD in Environmental Studies and led a 5-person data science team at VSCO before founding Polyculture.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://polycultureresearch.com/contact): Reach us at devon@polycultureresearch.com. Based in Petaluma, CA; working with clients nationwide.
